meaning: adv.鏁欒偛鍦版湁鍏虫暀鑲插湴,鏁欒偛涓婂湴,
examples: I was lucky enough to have my tuition covered by a lottery-funded scholarship called HOPE (Helping Outstanding Pupils Educationally).
The national tests were educationally unsound.
Children living in inner-city areas may be educationally disadvantaged.
The authors habitually think of immigrants filling educationally graded slots in some pre-determined economy.
All kids are not educationally pure but that does mean they are not smart.
